narrative:
Eagle Twp township has 813 registered voters, with 33.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 63.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 59.8 percentage points.
